requirement_topic.en: Fire Safety and Thermal Runaway Controls
requirement_topic.zh: 消防安全与热失控控制
requirement_topic.zht: 消防安全與熱失控控制

summary.en: Myanmar BESS projects should document thermal runaway prevention, fire detection, suppression, spacing, ventilation, emergency shutdown, and site fire-response procedures. Local fire authority, project owner, insurer, or lender requirements may determine the accepted evidence, often referencing IEC 62933 system safety and internationally recognized fire-test data.
summary.zh: 缅甸储能项目应记录热失控预防、火灾探测、灭火、间距、通风、紧急停机和现场消防响应程序。当地消防主管、项目业主、保险方或贷款方可能决定可接受证据，且常参考IEC 62933系统安全和国际认可消防测试数据。
summary.zht: 緬甸儲能項目應記錄熱失控預防、火災探測、滅火、間距、通風、緊急停機和現場消防應變程序。當地消防主管、項目業主、保險方或貸款方可能決定可接受證據，且常參考IEC 62933系統安全和國際認可消防測試資料。

standards_or_laws: Local fire authority and insurer requirements

summary.en: Common China BESS evidence is typically built around GB/T 36276 for lithium-ion batteries for energy storage, GB 4943.1 for electrical safety where applicable, and GB/T 34131 for grid-connected energy storage converter requirements.
summary.zh: 中国常见储能系统证据通常以GB/T 36276储能用锂离子电池、适用时的GB 4943.1电气安全，以及GB/T 34131并网储能变流器要求为基础。
summary.zht: 中國常見儲能系統證據通常以GB/T 36276儲能用鋰離子電池、適用時的GB 4943.1電氣安全，以及GB/T 34131並網儲能變流器要求為基礎。

gap.en: China GB/T 36276 evidence may not include the project-level fire scenario, emergency response, ventilation, and thermal propagation evidence required by Myanmar site approvers or international financiers.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 36276证据可能不包含缅甸现场审批方或国际融资方要求的项目级火灾场景、应急响应、通风和热扩散证据。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 36276證據可能不包含緬甸現場審批方或國際融資方要求的項目級火災場景、應急應變、通風和熱擴散證據。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; may be required by local fire authority, owner, insurer, lender, or utility even where standards are voluntary.
mandatory_status.cn: China baseline normally uses GB/T 36276, GB 4943.1 where applicable, and GB/T 34131; site fire approval is project-specific.

source.publisher: Ministry of Science and Technology / MSTRD

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat fire safety as a site-approval package, not only a cell test report; include layout, ventilation, suppression, shutdown, SDS, and emergency response evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应把消防安全视为现场审批文件包，而不只是电芯测试报告；应包括布置、通风、灭火、停机、SDS和应急响应证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應把消防安全視為現場審批文件包，而不只是電芯測試報告；應包括佈置、通風、滅火、停機、SDS和應急應變證據。
